caption: A webpage features a section titled "TFNN Show Archive Channels Below" with a blue navigation bar containing links such as "TIGER TV," "NEWSLETTERS," and "SERVICES." A video thumbnail titled "Daily Stock Market Recap" shows a man with glasses in a dark suit speaking. A blue banner overlay appears at the bottom of the screen, reading "Basil Chapman" in large white text, followed by "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022." As the video progresses, the view shifts to a different part of the archive. A second video thumbnail appears featuring "David Mazza," identified as the "Managing Director, Head of Product, Direxion," showing a man in a grey blazer gesturing while speaking to another man. Beside this is a description for "Tom O'Brien - Interviews." Throughout the sequence, the banner for "Basil Chapman" and "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022" remains fixed at the bottom of the screen.
